zh.Semington or Draycott, Wiltshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭維爾爾謝明頓
zh.Semington, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾謝明頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margery Darell於大約1462年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾時，她的父親Sir George Darrell44歲，母親Margaret Stourton30歲。她於1470年與Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年在英國英格蘭維爾爾謝明頓享年49歲。

zh-hans.Semington or Draycott, Wiltshire, Englan: 英国英格兰維爾爾謝明頓
zh-hans.Semington, Wiltshire, England: 英国英格兰維爾爾謝明頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margery Darell于大约1462年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾时，她的父亲Sir George Darrell44岁，母亲Margaret Stourton30岁。她于1470年与Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1510年在英国英格兰維爾爾謝明頓享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Darell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margery Darell was born about 1462, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir George Darrell, was 44 and her mother, Margaret Stourton, was 30. She married Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath in 1470, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1510, in Semington, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margery Darell est née environ 1462, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir George Darrell, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stourton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath en 1470, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Semington, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margery Darell um 1462 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Darrell 44 und ihre Mutter Margaret Stourton 30. Sie hat 1470 in England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1510 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Semington, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margery Darell è nata il circa 1462 nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir George Darrell, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Margaret Stourton, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath nel 1470, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1510, nel Semington, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margery Darellが約1462年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir George Darrellは44歳，母Margaret Stourtonは30歳であった。1470年にイギリスイギリスでSir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアセミントンで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margery Darell(이)가 대략 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Darrell(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stourton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 젬잉턴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Semington or Draycott, Wiltshire, Englan: Semington, Wiltūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margery Darell nasceu aproximadamente 1462, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir George Darrell, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stourton, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath em 1470, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1510, em Semington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margery Darell родилась около 1462 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir George Darrell было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stourton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath в 1470 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности семингтон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margery Darell nació aproximadamente 1462, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir George Darrell, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret Stourton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Longe of Drayton-Cerne, Knight of the Garter and Bath en 1470, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1510, en Semington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años.
